OpenDay.heroTitle: Discover the World of Music — for Free
OpenDay.heroSubtitle: Join an open day at the conservatory nearest you. Try instruments, meet teachers, and find the program that's right for you.
OpenDay.feature1Desc: Talk directly with teachers and the conservatory director, no commitment required.
OpenDay.feature2Desc: Free trial with a variety of instruments, guided by professional teachers.
OpenDay.feature3Desc: At the end of the open day, schedule a free personal trial lesson.
OpenDay.howItWorksTitle: What happens at an open day?
OpenDay.step1Desc: Free hands-on time with a variety of instruments.
OpenDay.step2Desc: Personal conversation with teachers and the conservatory director.
OpenDay.step3Desc: Receive a free trial lesson from a professional teacher.
OpenDay.formTitle: Choose an open day and register
OpenDay.formSubtitle: Choose the conservatory and time that suits you, and fill in your details.
OpenDay.noEventsForFilters: No open days match the selected filters.
OpenDay.noSlots: No available time slots for this event.
OpenDay.missingDetailsDesc: Please select an event and an appointment time before submitting.
OpenDay.successDesc: We have your details. A representative will contact you before the open day to confirm your appointment.
OpenDay.noOpenDays: No active open days at the moment. Please check back soon.
